purpose: Versioned code-neutral manifest contract for actual CHUI and external AMR-hydro profile outputs.
compatibility_policy: Reject mismatched EOS, time, units, boundary conditions, geometry, or active physics. Explicit conversion must occur before comparison.
external_data_policy: No field may identify RAMSES, ENZO, AREPO, Athena++, or another solver unless it was generated by that solver and carries actual provenance.
